title: Cross of Glory

{{Quote|From Coruscant to the farthest reaches of the Outer Rim, you will be known as the saviors of the Republic.|[[Forn Dodonna]] to Revan and his companions|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The '''Cross of Glory''' was the highest award given by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]].<ref name="KOTOR" /><ref name="Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref>

==Overview==
After the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Forn Dodonna]] bestowed the medal upon [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and each of his allies for their actions up to and through the battle that saw the destruction of the [[Star Forge]] and the breaking of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Revan's Cross of Glory]] later became a valuable prize to the forces of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

After the [[Hero of Tython]]'s duel with the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]], the Hero of Tython, [[T7-O1]], [[C2-N2 (Hero of Tython)|C2-N2]], [[Kira Carsen]], [[Archiban Frodrick Kimble]], [[Fideltin Rusk]] and [[Scourge (Sith)|Scourge]] were awarded the Cross of Glory by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Satele Shan]].<ref name="Doomsday" />

In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Duro (Galactic War)|Battle of Duro]] the Cross of Glory was awarded to [[Republic Strategic Information Service]] [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Theron Shan]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Gnost-Dural]], and [[Teff'ith]].<ref name="Annihilation" />

{{Military-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If [[HK-47]] or [[T3-M4]] were to free Revan, Carth Onasi and Bastila Shan in the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] prison, Carth makes a comment saying that: "You may be a droid, but when this is all over I'm going to see that the Republic gives you a medal for your part in this." This may or may not relate to the droids actually receiving any decorations.

On ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', if the player is a [[Republic trooper]] and captured General [[Arkos Rakton]], the Trooper is awarded the Cross of Glory. But if Rakton is killed, the [[Chancellor's Service Medal]] will be awarded instead.
